nasb.text: “However, if she should marry while under her vows or the rash statement of her lips by which she has bound herself,

esv.text: “If she marries a husband, while under her vows or any thoughtless utterance of her lips by which she has bound herself,

cnv.text: “如果她已嫁了丈夫，她許願或嘴裡說冒失話約束自己的時候，

ccb.text: “倘若有女子出嫁前许了愿或信口起了誓，
